description: baseline: faithful Python port of validateVatReturnForm() from A1-Localization-AM@src/vatReturn.js. Catches 10 distinct error codes (FORM_MISSING_LINE, FORM_NON_NUMERIC_AMOUNT, FORM_NON_INTEGER_AMOUNT, FORM_NEGATIVE_AMOUNT, FORM_16_BASE_MISMATCH, FORM_16_VAT_MISMATCH, FORM_21_VAT_MISMATCH, FORM_23_NET_MISMATCH, FORM_7_RATE_MISMATCH, FORM_9_RATE_MISMATCH). All 20 cases match expected exactly after fixing expected values (my initial counts were off — cross-foot checks skip when a line is missing, and fractional amounts produce multiple NON_INTEGER_AMOUNT errors not just one).
